original: Reveling in the sort of stylish fashion and utter swagger only a deprecated wasteland environment could provide, this auburn brown jacket could woo the folks at home and make anyone look good rocking a pompadour. It jingles faintly with each shake though, betraying the armored plates inside of it. Of course, no protective equipment would be complete without a matching set of pants and comfortable undershirt.
